title: Dolphins Could Replace Jaylen Waddle With Former Pro Bowl WR
description: The Miami Dolphins need to find a replacement for WR Jaylen Waddle, and they could do so with a former Pro Bowler.

title: WWE Fans Demand Triple H Bring Back Kairi Sane After Surprising Release
description: WWE fans continued to express frustration with Triple H and WWE after Kairi Sane's sudden release last week.

title: Magic overcome shooting woes to push top-seeded Pistons to brink with Game 4 win
description: The Magic overcame their shooting woes by protecting the ball. They had only 12 turnovers to 20 for Detroit.

title: Betnijah Laney-Hamilton ‘felt good’ making long-awaited Liberty return in preseason opener
description: On Saturday, Betnijah Laney-Hamilton finally greeted Liberty fans again during preseason action against the Fever.

title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
description: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.

title: Newspaper headlines: 'United King Don' and 'PM battles to block sleaze vote'
description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla's state visit to the US dominates Tuesday's papers.

title: Iranian foreign minister meets with Putin as U.S.-Iran talks falter - The Washington Post
description: Iranian foreign minister meets with Putin as U.S.-Iran talks falter  The Washington Post

title: Rams Could Turn to Stefon Diggs After Passing on WRs During Draft
description: Polarizing WR Stefon Diggs could land in L.A. as the Rams continue looking to fill a much-needed WR3 position.

title: Giancarlo Stanton hitting IL as Yankees’ waiting game ends with ‘huge’ loss
description: After getting 72 hours to see if his calf could make enough improvement, Giancarlo Stanton still could not avoid the injured list.

title: Terry Rozier could face new federal bribery charges in alleged gambling scheme
description: Terry Rozier will be facing additional charges related to the basketball player soliciting and receiving bribes during an alleged gambling scheme.

title: Jimmy Kimmel repeats ‘hateful’ joke about ‘expectant widow’ Melania Trump in attempt to defend himself after WHCD shooting
description: Kimmel, who narrowly dodged outright cancellation for making similarly distasteful jokes about Charlie Kirk's assassination in September, took to the air with a vengeance in his Monday night show.
